allocation_strategy: Clinical judgment prioritizing salivary gland tumor differentials and head/neck squamous cell carcinoma variants with emphasis on diagnostically challenging entities

questions.education_objective: Distinguish pleomorphic adenoma from myoepithelioma and understand malignant transformation risk
Recognize Warthin tumor morphology and distinguish from other cystic salivary lesions
Recognize mucoepidermoid carcinoma and apply grading criteria for prognosis
Identify adenoid cystic carcinoma patterns and understand perineural invasion tendency

questions.topic: Acinic cell adenocarcinoma vs. normal acinar tissue
questions.education_objective: Distinguish acinic cell adenocarcinoma from normal salivary gland acini
Recognize PLGA morphology and understand predilection for minor salivary glands
Identify salivary duct carcinoma and understand aggressive behavior
Distinguish necrotizing sialometaplasia from squamous cell carcinoma

questions.topic: Sjögren syndrome in minor salivary gland biopsy
questions.education_objective: Recognize Sjögren syndrome changes and apply focus scoring criteria
Distinguish HPV-associated from conventional oral squamous cell carcinoma
Grade oral squamous dysplasia and understand progression risk

questions.topic: Fibrous dysplasia vs. other fibro-osseous lesions
questions.education_objective: Recognize fibrous dysplasia and distinguish from other fibro-osseous lesions

questions.topic: Pyogenic granuloma vs. peripheral giant cell granuloma
questions.education_objective: Distinguish pyogenic granuloma from peripheral giant cell granuloma
Distinguish schneiderian papilloma from squamous papilloma and malignant potential
Recognize olfactory neuroblastoma and apply Hyams grading system

questions.topic: Sinonasal undifferentiated carcinoma vs. other undifferentiated tumors
questions.education_objective: Distinguish SNUC from other undifferentiated sinonasal malignancies
Recognize juvenile nasopharyngeal angiofibroma and understand clinical context
Recognize laryngeal SCC and grade associated dysplasia
Distinguish vocal cord polyp from vocal cord nodule morphologically
Recognize laryngeal papilloma and assess for malignant transformation
Recognize cholesteatoma morphology and understand clinical significance
Recognize paraganglioma morphology and understand site-specific behavior

questions.topic: Granular cell tumor of oral cavity
questions.education_objective: Recognize granular cell tumor and distinguish from other granular lesions
Recognize nasopharyngeal lymphoepithelioma and EBV association
Distinguish mucocele from ranula and understand pathogenesis
